name: Armed Services YMCA Wellness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Armed Services YMCA Wellness Center in Harker Heights, TX! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. You can reserve the courts.

name: Chisolm Trail Park
description: Chisolm Trail Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Belton, TX. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: All open play.  First come first served.  If all of the courts are full paddle stacking is recommended.

name: Crossroads Tennis and Pickelball courts
description: Crossroads Tennis and Pickelball courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Temple, TX. There are 6 outdoor concrete and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Harker Heights Recreation Center
description: Harker Heights Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Harker Heights, TX. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Heights Athletic Club
description: Heights Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Harker Heights, TX. There are 9 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: Killeen Community Center
description: Killeen Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Killeen, TX. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Lions Club Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lions Club Park in Killeen, TX! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Membership or $5 daily pass.

name: Long Branch Pickleball Courts
description: Long Branch Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Killeen, TX. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Summit Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Summit Recreation Center in Temple, TX! There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: The Commonwealth
description: The Commonwealth is a place to play pickleball in Temple, TX. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, and lights. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Walker park pickleball courts
description: Come play pickleball at Walker park pickleball courts in Temple, TX! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Wildflower Country Club
description: Wildflower Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Temple, TX. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Wilson Park Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Wilson Park Recreation Center in Temple, TX! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include trainers or lessons, restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, adaptive programming, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Youth free, adults $3, senior discount.
